title: mussaenda lanceolata
intro: Mussaenda lanceolata, also known as the "Butterfly Bush", is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Mussaenda lanceolata include treating fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations for its various therapeutic uses.
